{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Rosegold curses
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] spat words that [[Lindon]] suspected were [[Rosegold curses]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
